name: probashi-shield
description: Probashi Shield - migrant worker anti-fraud platform (backend + frontend monorepo)

scripts.install:all: npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install
scripts.db:setup: npm run setup:env && npm --prefix backend run db:push && npm --prefix backend run db:seed
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && npm run db:setup
scripts.dev: concurrently -n API,WEB -c green,cyan "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix backend run build && npm --prefix frontend run build
